what_it_does: Records the grounding-batch result for the C5-replay-desktop.html mockup (a forensic-audit / decision-replay dashboard): a 'ground' summary, counts (51/51/33), and 12 confirmed vs 21 flagged UI-element dossiers, each with a ui:// address, capabilities, grounding state, plain-language howto, feature mapping, and accuracy-jury (plus occasional refcheck) verdict.
observations: Screen is a forensic audit dashboard tracing one decision's full chronological history from idea to resolution, with raw log and causal chain.

Dossiers cover replay controls, activity-feed markers (build-closed, criterion, root-bind/SEQ-412 anchor, verdict, lineage), replay-timeline nodes (intent, dispatch, verify, surfaced-for-review, comment), CoA cards and audit panels.
A trajectory dossier states the append-only log shape (seq, ts, kind, summary) that trains the twin, spanning both bridge and MCP faces.
An audit-window dossier mentions a truncation limit of the last 999 events.
A lineage dossier encodes a provable resolve chain (ENG-resolve): verify each hop from idea through resolve to system action.
One refcheck feature-fabrication failure: ui://inbox/layers maps_to_feature 'INB-layers' (not an inventory id nor 'proposed').
A large 11-member flagged cluster (ui://activity/audit) is unanimously voted ungrounded.
Addresses ui://activity/audit and ui://inbox/audit each appear in multiple distinct dossiers.
Grounding values include built, proposed, and defer (ui://inbox/walk, ui://inbox/coa are 'defer').
howto.how_to_change names ForensicAudit.tsx, runtime/suite.py:replay, suite.py:now, suite.py:coa, suite.py:resolve, activity.tsx.
standouts: Defines the append-only event-log record shape (seq/ts/kind/summary) as the substrate that trains the twin.
Provable resolve lineage (ENG-resolve) — verify the causal chain hop by hop — captured as an audit element.
Largest, most-flagged batch by element count (51); 21 flagged including an 11-member unanimously-ungrounded audit cluster.
conventions: Same confirmed/flagged + two-layer grading as sibling rg10 files.
ui:// addressing across inbox, inbox/coa, activity, activity/replay namespaces.
Plain-language howto triad; read-only audit elements note 'it reflects, it doesn't drive'.
Some maps_to_feature values are 'proposed' (permitted); one fabricated id caught.
concerns: Address reuse: ui://activity/audit and ui://inbox/audit each map to several different dossiers in one file.
High flag rate (21 of 33 clusters) — much of the replay dashboard is not confidently grounded.
maps_to_feature 'EVT-log' spans many distinct represents values (criterion, audit, audit-window, root-bind, derived, replay).
notes: The forensic decision-replay dashboard inventory — 12 confirmed, 21 flagged — defining the append-only log shape that trains the twin and a provable resolve lineage, with one fabricated feature id caught.
questions: Should the repeated ui://activity/audit and ui://inbox/audit addresses be deduped or are they genuinely distinct views?
Is the 999-event audit-window truncation a final design or a placeholder?
Why is the bulk of the audit/replay surface ungrounded — is most of it still proposed at this point?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: declared as a grounding result for the replay/forensic-audit desktop mockup and that is its content.
apparent_themes: Provable causal lineage from idea to authorized action
The event log as training substrate for the twin
intention_signals: It appears to be verifying which forensic-replay controls are grounded in built code while capturing the audit model — append-only log shape, provable resolve lineage, read-only reflection — as addressable elements, flagging the many uncertain mappings.
novelty: Ties the decision-replay UI directly to the append-only event-log record that trains the twin, and models a hop-by-hop provable resolve lineage as an auditable element.
contribution: Contributes the forensic decision-replay element inventory — trajectory/log shape, audit window, root-bind anchor, resolve lineage, replay-timeline nodes — with addresses, howtos, and two-layer grounding verdicts including a fabricated-feature catch.
summary_for_embedding: Grounding-batch JSON for the forensic decision-replay desktop mockup, listing 51 clustered UI dossiers (replay controls, append-only log trajectory, resolve lineage, audit window) with 12 confirmed and 21 flagged via refcheck-plus-jury grading.
intention_for_embedding: To check whether forensic-replay/audit controls are grounded in built code and capture the append-only log and provable resolve-lineage model, flagging uncertain or fabricated mappings for review.
